name: io.github.Cuneiform-LLC/clearlist
description: AI agent interface to ClearList, an AI-powered moving-sale platform. Create photo listings, publish a shareable sale page, manage reservations and buyer messages, and set pickup availability.

environmentVariables.name: CLEARLIST_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ClearList API key (cl_<64-hex>). Optional — if omitted, an agent can acquire one at runtime via the email-verification onboarding tools.

environmentVariables.name: CLEARLIST_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the ClearList API. Defaults to https://clearlist.me.
